citizenship
are you a filipino citizen who resides in the philippines?
complete address - please follow this format. unit/ room no., floor, building name, lot # block # phase # house #, street name, subdivision, barangay, municipality, province, zip code, country
please paste your facebook profile link. (e.g. https://www.facebook.com/ltotheaa )

facebook is an important platform for hellorache hva community group interaction. that being said, your facebook name must include at least your real last name (e.g. "louis paloma" / "la paloma" are both acceptable). are you amenable to this? if your fb name doesn't already reflect it, here's how to change it: https://www.facebook.com/help/173909489329079
what are your skills?
please state any other foreign language ability (if any)
for what reasons have you missed work in a previous job?
do you have any other commitments that may affect your ability to attend our training and eventually work?
do you have any travel plans for this year?
do you have any pending visa applications? if yes, explain in detail.
our trainings are from monday through friday night shifts (ph time). will you be able to attend this?
please upload a copy of your updated/valid nbi clearance. note: nbi clearance must still be valid for at least four months before the date of expiration.
what is your highest educational attainment? select only one from the choices given.
please upload your diploma(s).
please upload your certifications in healthcare, e.g., medical transcription, cpc, etc. (if any; if none, please reupload your diploma /tor here). applicants must have successfully completed a 4-year

please upload 1 of the following valid government ids: < passport> pvc-type id card with current address stated: (unified multi-purpose id, voter's id, or national id) if you have none of the above, w

please upload a 60-90-second introduction video to a google drive folder. you should appear on camera from the waist up with your face and hand gestures visible to the audience. in the video, please p

please run an internet speed test and post the link to your results here. the required results for your internet speed test should not be less than 10 mbps, both for your upload and download speed. pl

please take the typing test and post the link to your results here. the required result of your typing test should not be less than 50 wpm and have an accuracy of at least 95%. please refer to this li
how did you hear about us?
if you were referred by a friend and is in hellorache, please state his/her complete name. (1 name only)

take the free personality test. https://www.16personalities.com/free-personality-test start the exam by clicking the "take the test” button. save the result to be emailed to your email inbox, and kind
kindly tick the result from your personality test.

if you encounter any errors while submitting your application, please feel free to email us at recruiting@hellorache.com.
